title: Formula using values of previous/next item

posts.author: MarkusSt (Markus Standau)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to use monday.com as an agenda planning tool, where typically each item is one presentation/slot of a conference.

Changing the duration of one item will mean the others get shifted, and currently I would have to manually change the startime for each item, plus this is not very flexible wan using drag and drop to move presentations (items) on the agenda.

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Markus,

Did you look at dependencies?

Want to break free of the Formula column and take your formulas to the next level? Take a look at the Advanced Formula Booster.
